creator: tomason510@gmail.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       open_jtalk
#       open_jtalk/Makefile
#       open_jtalk/files
#       open_jtalk/files/patch-mkam
#       open_jtalk/files/patch-mkin
#       open_jtalk/pkg-descr
#       open_jtalk/distinfo
#       open_jtalk/pkg-plist
#
echo c - open_jtalk
mkdir -p open_jtalk > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - open_jtalk/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/Makefile << 'ea0b65af72e3a3fd3af1587e7b72a515'
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=              open_jtalk
XPORTVERSION=           1.10
XCATEGORIES=            audio japanese
XMASTER_SITES=          SOURCEFORGE
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    open-jtalk/Open%20JTalk/open_jtalk-${PORTVERSION}
XDISTNAME=              open_jtalk-${PORTVERSION}
XCOMMENT=               Japanese Text-to-speech system using HTS-engine and Mecab
X
XMAINTAINER=            tomason510@gmail.com
X
XLICENSE=               BSD3CLAUSE
XLICENSE_FILE=          ${WRKSRC}/COPYING
X
XHAS_CONFIGURE=         yes
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=         ${PREFIX}/lib/libHTSEngine.a:audio/hts_engine-API \
X                       ${PREFIX}/include/iconv.h:converters/libiconv
X
Xpost-install:
X       ${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/AUTHORS   ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/COPYING   ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/ChangeLog ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/INSTALL   ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/NEWS      ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X       ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README    ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
ea0b65af72e3a3fd3af1587e7b72a515
echo c - open_jtalk/files
mkdir -p open_jtalk/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - open_jtalk/files/patch-mkam
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/files/patch-mkam << '13076746c456a6a836125911fd1b6494'
X--- mecab-naist-jdic/Makefile.am.orig    2017-03-08 17:44:49.859643000 +0000
X+++ mecab-naist-jdic/Makefile.am 2017-03-08 17:46:02.213011000 +0000
X@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
X
X MAINTAINERCLEANFILES = Makefile.in char.bin matrix.bin sys.dic unk.dic left-id.def rewrite.def pos-id.def right-id.def
X
X-dicdir = @prefix@/dic
X+dicdir = @prefix@/dic/open_jtalk
X
X dic_DATA   = char.bin matrix.bin sys.dic unk.dic left-id.def rewrite.def pos-id.def right-id.def
X
X
13076746c456a6a836125911fd1b6494
echo x - open_jtalk/files/patch-mkin
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/files/patch-mkin << '8f1090d13afa869afdca544dd634a769'
X--- mecab-naist-jdic/Makefile.in.orig    2017-03-08 17:45:05.675918000 +0000
X+++ mecab-naist-jdic/Makefile.in 2017-03-08 17:47:34.916483000 +0000
X@@ -265,7 +265,7 @@
X EXTRA_DIST = COPYING Makefile.mak naist-jdic.csv matrix.def _left-id.def _pos-id.def _rewrite.def _right-id.def char.def unk.def feature.def
X DISTCLEANFILES = *.log *.out *~
X MAINTAINERCLEANFILES = Makefile.in char.bin matrix.bin sys.dic unk.dic left-id.def rewrite.def pos-id.def right-id.def
X-dicdir = @prefix@/dic
X+dicdir = @prefix@/dic/open_jtalk
X dic_DATA = char.bin matrix.bin sys.dic unk.dic left-id.def rewrite.def pos-id.def right-id.def
X all: all-am
X
X
8f1090d13afa869afdca544dd634a769
echo x - open_jtalk/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/pkg-descr << '7c733b7b5ca3c47ecd9cd028b3f5d009'
XThe Open JTalk is a Japanese TTS System.
XIt has been being developed by HTS working group
Xand some graduate students in Nagoya Institute of Technology
X
XWWW: http://open-jtalk.sourceforge.net/
7c733b7b5ca3c47ecd9cd028b3f5d009
echo x - open_jtalk/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/distinfo << '944ad8a94cb0ff810b2456c3c1b1bd84'
XTIMESTAMP = 1488996667
XSHA256 (open_jtalk-1.10.tar.gz) = 5b77ee729e546ca6a22d0b08cda0923fb4225fa782b26c2511b66cc644c14b7d
XSIZE (open_jtalk-1.10.tar.gz) = 14950692
944ad8a94cb0ff810b2456c3c1b1bd84
echo x - open_jtalk/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >open_jtalk/pkg-plist << '6026dfbd302a855bdfc484a46a207e70'
Xbin/open_jtalk
X%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
X%%DOCSDIR%%/COPYING
X%%DOCSDIR%%/ChangeLog
X%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALL
X%%DOCSDIR%%/NEWS
X%%DOCSDIR%%/README
Xdic/open_jtalk/char.bin
Xdic/open_jtalk/matrix.bin
Xdic/open_jtalk/sys.dic
Xdic/open_jtalk/unk.dic
Xdic/open_jtalk/left-id.def
Xdic/open_jtalk/rewrite.def
Xdic/open_jtalk/pos-id.def
Xdic/open_jtalk/right-id.def
X@dir dic/open_jtalk
X@dir %%DOCSDIR%%
X@dir share/licenses/open_jtalk-1.10
6026dfbd302a855bdfc484a46a207e70
exit
